entry.title: Congrats Caleb!!
entry.content: Congratulations to Caleb for successfully defending and graduating! It was great to get a chance to meet Caleb’s family, and he was my first student to boot! Caleb is off to New York City to be a data scientist for Lyft. He will be missed!
entry.summary: Congratulations to Caleb for successfully defending and graduating! It was great to get a chance to meet Caleb’s family, and he was my first student to boot! Caleb is off to New York City to be a data scientist for Lyft. He will be missed!
